name: TestIso11783IL_PDDGetValue
title: TestIso11783IL_PDDGetValue
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by: Iso11783IL_PDDGetValueRaw, Iso11783IL_PDDGetValuePhysical
float TestIso11783IL_PDDGetValue( dbNode node, dbSignal signal, dword elementNumber );
float TestIso11783IL_PDDGetValue( dbNode node, dword ddi, dword elementNumber );

The function requests the value of a process variable. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
signal signal from the database The attribute DDI must be defined for the signal. The signal must be defined in the same database as the node!
value of the process variable, 0 if the variable is not defined
